title: Marketing Analyst - Audience Management / Analytics (m/w/d)
required_skills: Analytics experience in Audience Management, Marketing Analytics or comparable field
Customer/usage/campaign data analysis → concrete operational insights
Zielgruppenanalysen, Selektionen, Segmentierungen (audience segmentation and selection)
Evaluating Direktmarketing / communication measures using KPIs
BI tools and analytics platforms (BSI, Formware, or equivalent)
German language (role is German-speaking company, Hannover HQ)
bonus_skills: Customer Experience and customer communications interest
University degree in economics / business / related field
matched_skills: Marketing analytics with audience segmentation (GRG: B2B customer segmentation across verticals; IPC: lead analytics and targeting)
Campaign performance evaluation using KPIs (IPC: 4 campaigns ROI; GRG: pipeline conversion tracking)
Customer journey and funnel analytics (Hapag-Lloyd: booking funnel analysis, friction identification)
Cohort analysis and audience behaviour tracking (Moli Media: live-stream audience analytics 4,000+ attendees)
KPI framework design and structured reporting (HSBC: C-suite dashboards, variance reports)
Power BI PL-300 + Qlik Sense ✓ (directly maps to BI-tools requirement)
missing_skills: German Arbeitssprache — B1+ is a soft risk for Hannover-based German company
Direct marketing / Direktmarketing campaign execution experience (Boru analyses campaigns, does not plan/send them)
Specific tools BSI/Formware — but BI skill transferable
Insurance / lifestyle warranty domain (soft — role is domain-agnostic analytics)
core_responsibilities: Analyse customer, usage and campaign data → derive concrete operational insights
Develop and execute audience segmentation, selection and profiling
Evaluate impact of communications and direct marketing using KPIs
Develop and refine selection logic, models, algorithms continuously
Create reporting and presentations on campaign and communications performance
recommended_emphasis: GRG: customer segmentation across B2B verticals → direct match for 'target audience analysis and segmentation'
IPC: campaign KPI tracking with ROI measurement → maps to 'Wirkung von Direktmarketingmaßnahmen bewerten'
Moli Media: cohort and audience behavior analytics → 'further developing selection logic and algorithms'
Hapag-Lloyd: friction point identification in customer journey → 'operative Insights ableiten'
Power BI PL-300 + Qlik Sense → direct answer to BI-tools requirement
HSBC: structured C-suite reporting → 'meaningful reports and presentations'

company_info.size_raw: WERTGARANTIE Group — lifestyle insurer (electronics, bikes, e-bikes), Hannover
